description: The Risk Management team has identified a hazard (RISK-6: Battery Overheating) that requires software mitigation. Implement the traceability chain from User Need to Test Case for this feature. In the 'NEEDS' document, create a User Need described as 'The user shall be alerted if the device battery temperature exceeds safe limits.' In the 'SRS' document, create a 'Functional' type Requirement described as 'The system shall display a flashing red temperature icon when the battery sensor reports > 50C.' and link it to the User Need (satisfaction) and 'RISK-6' (mitigation). In the 'TESTS' document, create a Test Case described as 'Simulate battery temp of 51C and verify the red icon flashes within 2 seconds.' and link it to the SRS requirement (verification).
